Document:
#Paths
As the Heretic, you have a choice of several [color=#8f63e6]Paths[/color] to follow on your journey to [color=#8f63e6]Ascension[/color].
These [color=#8f63e6]Paths[/color] are permanent; you can only choose one. Your choice will lock you into a certain [color=#8f63e6]Blade Ritual[/color] and a certain type of [color=#8f63e6]Ascension[/color].
Choose a [color=#8f63e6]Path[/color] that you believe is best suited to your character and role.
